word: H6847 - צׇפְנַת פַּעְנֵחַ - Tsophnath Paʻnêach - tsof-nath' pah-nay'-akh - Zaphnath-paaneah

sections.paragraph:
Original: צפנת פּענח

Transliteration: tsâphnath pa‛nêach

Phonetic: tsof-nath' pah-nay'-akh

BDB Definition:

Zaphnath-paaneah = "treasury of the glorious rest"
  1. a name given by Pharaoh to Joseph

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
